functions.name: _main
functions.docstring: ContextCraft CLI.

functions.name: _get_api_key
functions.docstring: Load ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from .env (repo and cwd) and environment.

functions.name: _run_analysis
functions.docstring: Run AST parsing on all language files; return (file_analyses, warnings).

functions.name: _run_git_and_patterns
functions.docstring: Run pattern detection, dependency graph, and git analysis; return (patterns, dependency_graph, git_context).

functions.name: init
functions.signature: init(repo_path: Path, no_ai: bool, format: str) -> None
functions.docstring:
Analyze the repository and generate context.pack.md (or JSON).
Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for AI synthesis unless --no-ai is used.

functions.name: main
functions.docstring: Entry point for the CLI.

functions.name: extract_ai_briefing_footer
functions.docstring: Extract the AI Briefing Footer section from Claude's markdown for Quick Copy.

functions.name: format_context_pack
functions.signature: format_context_pack(claude_output: str, repo_name: str, output_path: Path) -> str
functions.docstring:
Wrap Claude's output in context.pack.md with YAML header and Quick Copy section.
Returns the full document string; also writes to output_path.

classes.name: FileInfo
classes.docstring: Metadata for a single file in the tree.

classes.name: FileTree
classes.docstring: Result of scanning a repository: files and language stats.

functions.name: _load_gitignore_spec
functions.docstring: Load .gitignore rules from repo root into a PathSpec.

functions.name: _should_skip
functions.signature: _should_skip(path: Path, relative: str, spec: pathspec.PathSpec) -> bool
functions.docstring: Return True if path should be skipped (gitignore or binary/skip rules).

functions.name: _is_likely_binary
functions.docstring: Heuristic: read first 8k and check for null bytes.

functions.name: scan_repo
functions.docstring:
Walk the repository recursively, respecting .gitignore and skip rules.
Collect file paths, extensions, sizes, last modified; detect primary languages.

functions.name: read_file_safe
functions.signature: read_file_safe(path: Path, encoding: str, max_size: int) -> str | None
functions.docstring: Read file contents safely. Returns None on encoding error or if binary/large.

functions.name: build_analysis_payload
functions.signature: build_analysis_payload(file_tree: dict[str, Any], file_analyses: list[dict[str, Any]], patterns: dict[str, Any], dependency_graph: dict[str, Any], git_context: dict[str, Any] | None) -> str
functions.docstring: Build a single JSON payload for the user prompt.

functions.name: synthesize
functions.signature: synthesize(analysis_payload: str, api_key: str, model: str, max_tokens: int) -> str
functions.docstring:
Call Claude API to generate the Context Pack text.
Retries up to 3 times on 429 or 529 with exponential backoff (2s, 4s, 8s).
Raises on other API or key errors; caller should handle and e.g. save raw JSON.

functions.name: test_parse_file_python_extracts_class_and_functions
functions.docstring: Parse a small Python snippet; assert class and function names are extracted.

functions.name: test_analysis_to_dict_includes_warnings
functions.docstring: analysis_to_dict includes warnings field.

functions.name: test_build_dependency_graph_internal_modules
functions.docstring: Build graph from mock FileTree with 2–3 Python files; assert top internal modules.

functions.name: test_js_ts_imports_relative_included
functions.docstring: Relative imports are included and normalized.

functions.name: test_normalize_relative_import
functions.docstring: _normalize_relative_import strips ./ and ../ and normalizes.

functions.name: test_detect_patterns_naming_snake_case
functions.docstring: Run detect_patterns on minimal FileTree with snake_case source; assert naming detected.

functions.name: test_format_context_pack_produces_yaml_header
functions.docstring: format_context_pack() produces output with the YAML header.

functions.name: test_extract_ai_briefing_footer_when_present
functions.docstring: extract_ai_briefing_footer() correctly extracts the footer section when present.

functions.name: test_extract_ai_briefing_footer_when_absent
functions.docstring: extract_ai_briefing_footer() returns None (falsy) when section absent.

functions.name: test_scan_repo_not_a_directory
functions.docstring: Scanning a file raises NotADirectoryError.

functions.name: test_scan_repo_empty_dir
functions.docstring: Scanning an empty directory returns empty file list.

functions.name: test_scan_repo_respects_gitignore
functions.docstring: Files and dirs in .gitignore are skipped.

functions.name: test_scan_repo_primary_languages
functions.docstring: Primary languages are detected by file count.

functions.name: test_file_info_language
functions.docstring: FileInfo.language returns correct language for extension.

functions.name: test_read_file_safe_success
functions.docstring: read_file_safe returns content for valid UTF-8 file.

functions.name: test_read_file_safe_invalid_encoding
functions.docstring: read_file_safe returns None for invalid UTF-8.

functions.name: test_read_file_safe_missing
functions.docstring: read_file_safe returns None for missing file.

classes.name: ClassInfo
classes.docstring: Extracted class with methods and docstring.

classes.name: FunctionInfo
classes.docstring: Extracted function with signature and docstring.

classes.name: FileAnalysis
classes.docstring: Structured analysis for one file: path, language, classes, functions, constants.

functions.name: _get_docstring
functions.docstring: Extract docstring from ast node.

functions.name: _analyze_python
functions.docstring: Use stdlib ast to extract classes, functions, constants from Python.

functions.name: _js_ts_analyze_tree_sitter
functions.signature: _js_ts_analyze_tree_sitter(source: bytes, path: str, language: str) -> FileAnalysis
functions.docstring: Use tree-sitter for JavaScript/TypeScript.

functions.name: _java_analyze_tree_sitter
functions.docstring: Use tree-sitter for Java (optional; fallback to empty analysis if not installed).

functions.name: parse_file
functions.signature: parse_file(file_info: FileInfo, source: str | None) -> FileAnalysis | None
functions.docstring:
Parse a single file and return structured analysis (classes, functions, constants).
Returns None if file could not be read or parsed; caller may skip or warn.

functions.name: analysis_to_dict
functions.docstring: Convert FileAnalysis to a JSON-serializable dict.

classes.name: DependencyGraph
classes.docstring: Import graph: who imports whom; top internal modules by import count.

functions.name: _normalize_module_path
functions.docstring: Normalize file path to module name (e.g. for Python: path/to/module.py -> path.to.module).

functions.name: _python_imports
functions.docstring: Extract import targets from Python source.

functions.name: _normalize_relative_import
functions.docstring: Resolve relative import to a clean module path (no leading ./, ../).

functions.name: _js_ts_imports
functions.docstring: Extract import targets from JS/TS source. Includes relative imports (internal); excludes bare package names (node_modules).

functions.name: _java_imports
functions.docstring: Extract import targets from Java source (package or top-level type).

functions.name: build_dependency_graph
functions.docstring: Parse imports across the repo; build graph; return top 10 most-imported internal modules.

functions.name: dependency_graph_to_dict
functions.docstring: Convert DependencyGraph to JSON-serializable dict.

classes.name: GitContext
classes.docstring: Git-derived context: recent commits, hotspot files, main branch.

functions.name: analyze_git
functions.signature: analyze_git(repo_path: Path, file_tree: FileTree | None) -> GitContext | None
functions.docstring:
Use gitpython to get last 30 commits, hotspot files, last 5 messages, main branch.
Returns None if not a git repo; returns GitContext with is_repo=False on error.

functions.name: git_context_to_dict
functions.signature: git_context_to_dict(ctx: GitContext | None) -> dict[str, Any] | None
functions.docstring: Convert GitContext to JSON-serializable dict; return None if ctx is None.

classes.name: Patterns
classes.docstring: Detected conventions: naming, testing, error handling, API, config.

functions.name: _detect_naming
functions.docstring: Determine primary naming convention from source samples.

functions.name: _detect_test_framework
functions.signature: _detect_test_framework(file_tree: FileTree, sources: list[tuple[str, str]]) -> str | None
functions.docstring: Detect test framework from file names and imports.

functions.name: _detect_error_handling
functions.docstring: Detect error handling style: try/except, custom exceptions.

functions.name: _detect_custom_exceptions
functions.docstring: Find custom exception class names.

functions.name: _detect_api_style
functions.docstring: Detect API style: REST, GraphQL, or internal.

functions.name: _detect_config_style
functions.docstring: Detect how config is loaded: env vars, config files, hardcoded.

functions.name: detect_patterns
functions.docstring:
Analyze naming conventions, test framework, error handling, API style, config.
Samples up to max_files of readable source files.

functions.name: patterns_to_dict
functions.docstring: Convert Patterns to JSON-serializable dict.

recent_commits: Initial commit of ContextCraft, a CLI tool for analyzing code repositories and generating structured Context Packs for AI coding tools. Added core functionality including file scanning, analysis, and synthesis using the Claude API. Included example environment configuration, project metadata, and basic usage documentation in README.
